name: Authentication and Authorization Boundary
rules: JWT cookie-based authentication via app/auth.py - never use token-in-URL or token-in-body
First signup becomes owner - email check only enforced when BB_OWNER_EMAIL env var is explicitly set
Role hierarchy: owner > admin > manager > user - higher roles inherit all lower permissions
Every protected endpoint must call require_role() or equivalent auth check as its first operation
User identity comes from the JWT session, never from request body or query parameters
Session revocation is checked hourly by APScheduler job - expired tokens are invalidated
Password changes invalidate all existing sessions for that user
Ownership transfer requires current owner role - no other role can initiate
Team-scoped access (team-lead, team-member, team-viewer) is additive to base role, never overrides it
Never store plaintext passwords - bcrypt hashing is mandatory
